$comment: Checksum-sealed witness registry: load-bearing substrings that must still exist in named files. Mutate ONLY via witness_check.py --add / --remove.

witnesses.why: anthropic key pattern must be matched before the openai pattern
compaction clamp prevents double-counting tokens after a transcript shrink
scan-branch emits the frozen SECRETS_JSON machine line
high-band recommendation string is the contract ORCHESTRATOR step 6 dispatches on
exit-1-only-on-orphans is the gate guarantee
branch-from-cwd fix for issue 26; regressing it re-blocks worktree commits

witnesses.must_contain: PREPARED by the company and SHIPPED by the owner
witnesses.why: the deploy boundary of the release doctrine
readiness table rows must keep citing the real gate commands
postmortems must name a mechanical prevention or say why none is possible
the issue-31 guarantee: the not-on-disk branch must inspect incoming content for a pre-accepted ADR
layer-3 execution gate - the written self/delegated decision derivation
mechanism-5 mechanized - independent audit must cover the current tree
FR-DE-15 - PR-mode work cannot start untracked
The never-clobber core invariant: user-modified payload goes to a .new sibling, never over the user file

witnesses.must_contain: refusing to downgrade $MANIFEST_VERSION -> $PKG_VERSION; re-run with --force to override
witnesses.why: Downgrade guard: an older package refuses to overwrite a newer install without --force
Manifest byte-determinism contract: sorted keys, no clock field - the bin-vs-bare parity test depends on it
Handoff-exactly-once loop guard: the re-exec child never re-checks the registry
Strictly-newer is the only re-exec trigger; equal or older proceeds silently with the current CLI
Fresh installs ship the arming manifest - the delegation enforcer is armed by default in the field

witnesses.must_contain: note: delegation enforcer installed but disarmed - create company/provenance.json to arm
witnesses.why: update never auto-arms - a payload refresh must not switch a project's enforcement regime

witnesses.must_contain: have = commands_by_matcher(existing_groups)  # issue-67: dedup per matcher
witnesses.why: Settings merge dedups per (matcher, command) - reverting to command-per-event re-drops multi-matcher hook groups

witnesses.must_contain: have = commands_by_matcher(existing_groups)  # issue-67: dedup per matcher
witnesses.why: update.sh merge block stays byte-identical to install.sh - the heal path for broken field installs depends on it
Record trees are scaffolded empty, never copied - reverting to copy_tree_if_absent re-leaks repo records into git-clone installs
Tarball belt - dropping the files-negations re-ships repo records via npm
run_check wiring assertion - regression means the models gate reads green while Task|Agent enforcement is unwired (code-without-wiring)
models.json merge heredoc coupling marker - install and update must migrate identically
Bare builtin-spawn BLOCK path - regression means built-in spawns silently inherit the session model (the live incident)
